**输出：** [3,0,0,3,3]

  - 最长的相邻对是 `["run", "run"]`，其公共前缀为 `"run"`（长度为 3）

**示例 2：**

**输入：** words = ["dog","racer","car"]

**输出：** [0,0,0]

    }

    // Compute suffix_max array

    suffix_max[n - 2] = prefixes[n - 2]

    for (i in n - 3 downTo 0) {

        suffix_max[i] = max(prefixes[i], suffix_max[i + 1])

    }

    val answer = LongArray(n)

        if (n - 1 < 2) {

            answer[i] = 0L

            continue

        }

        if (i == 0) {

                answer[i] = 0L

                continue

            }

            // Compute max of prefixes[1..n-2]

            val start = 1

            val end = n - 2

            if (start > end) {

                answer[i] = 0L

        } else if (i == n - 1) {

            if (n == 2) {

                answer[i] = 0L

                continue

            }

            // Compute max of prefixes[0..n-3]

            val start = 0

            val end = n - 3

            if (start > end) {

                answer[i] = 0L

            } else {

            val right_part = if (i + 1 <= n - 2) suffix_max[i + 1] else 0

            val max_left_right = max(left_part, right_part)

            val new_pair = lcp(words[i - 1], words[i + 1])

            answer[i] = max(max_left_right, new_pair).toLong()

        }

    }

    return answer

}
